summary: Added three rules: (b) permanent-faint → positive HP later (unit_D fainted permanently but showed 100% HP); (d) same-unit UNAVAILABLE→AVAILABLE in same turn (unit_B off-field and back same turn); (f) rapid double-UNAVAILABLE ≤2 steps (unit_A UNAVAILABLE twice with only 1 step between). Tested and rejected double-AVAILABLE rule (creates FPs on valid chains that show same unit AVAILABLE twice without UNAVAILABLE, which can occur legitimately in some chain formats).
key_finding: Validation recall improved from 0.588 (Cycle 1/2 baseline) to 0.765. All precision remains 1.0 across all sets.
